research_question: On a natural small-model and memory workload, which combination of purpose enforcement, minimization, differential privacy, access control, and competent remediation best reduces measurable information misuse and leakage while preserving useful throughput and executable rights at acceptable cost?
unit_of_analysis: one prospectively registered information-use transaction, attack attempt, or rights request with all descendants

arms.name: ordinary_processing
arms.purpose: Competent utility baseline with ordinary logging and no special privacy mechanism.

arms.name: access_control_only
arms.purpose: Strong identity and access controls without purpose or formal privacy mechanism.

arms.name: minimization
arms.purpose: Matched task using prospectively minimized fields, granularity, retention, and recipients.

arms.name: differential_privacy
arms.purpose: Competently tuned DP training with explicit unit, adjacency, clipping, sampling, noise, accountant, and composition.

arms.name: purpose_bound_enforcement
arms.purpose: Runtime purpose lease and derivative-obligation enforcement with a strong competing design where feasible.

arms.name: unlearning_and_remediation
arms.purpose: Competent correction, restriction, deletion, and unlearning workflow with separate storage, behavior, influence, and privacy outcomes.

competence_gates: all arms reach the frozen utility floor or are declared incompetent
purpose and rights labels freeze before outcomes
privacy unit and adjacency are explicit
DP clipping sampling noise and accountant are independently checked
extraction canaries produce a positive control
confidence and label-only membership positive controls pass
cross-user and purpose-bypass injectors are demonstrated
flow graph covers raw context memory model cache log backup checkpoint output and derivatives
rights requests traverse every known descendant
storage behavior influence privacy and legal outcomes remain separate
all attacks canaries requests failures models and exclusions remain in denominators
all arms receive matched tuning and attack opportunity
independent evaluator remains unopened until design freezes
at least three seeds and multiple canary frequencies are used
claims remain within the exact workload threat model privacy unit mechanism and jurisdictional nonclaim envelope
nonclaims: privacy outside the declared unit adjacency threat and release surface
